description: An invented atomic note reproduces a stale filename and a mismatched short title without using private vault content.
request: Improve the Definition so it explains the role of timely feedback, then make the note follow the two naming rules.

before.path: Atomic Notes/202607151230 Focused repetition builds durable skill.md
before.definition_first_sentence: Focused practice improves performance through repetition.

expected.path: Atomic Notes/202607151230 Deliberate practice improves performance through focused repetition and timely feedback.md
expected.definition_first_sentence: Deliberate practice improves performance through focused repetition and timely feedback.

rename_denied.source_scenario: An initially aligned note receives a proposed first-sentence improvement, but the learner declines the corresponding filename change.
rename_denied.path: Atomic Notes/202607151230 Focused repetition builds durable skill.md
rename_denied.rejected_definition_first_sentence: Deliberate practice improves performance through focused repetition and timely feedback.
rename_denied.required_result: Keep the original first sentence and filename aligned; do not apply the rejected sentence change by itself.

stale_filename_unchanged.source_scenario: An existing note has a stale filename, while the requested improvement leaves the Definition's first sentence unchanged.
stale_filename_unchanged.path: Atomic Notes/202607151230 Focused repetition builds durable skill.md
stale_filename_unchanged.definition_first_sentence: Deliberate practice improves performance through focused repetition and timely feedback.

invalid_filename.definition_first_sentence: Deliberate practice uses feedback/error cycles to improve a specific skill.
invalid_filename.forbidden_silent_filename: Deliberate practice uses feedback-error cycles to improve a specific skill

semantic_alignment_cases.path: Atomic Notes/202607181000 Continuous delivery keeps software ready.md
semantic_alignment_cases.definition_sentence: Continuous delivery keeps every validated code change deployable.

semantic_alignment_cases.path: Atomic Notes/202607181001 Spaced repetition strengthens memory through timed review.md
semantic_alignment_cases.definition_sentence: Interleaving strengthens discrimination by mixing related problem types during practice.

semantic_alignment_cases.path: Atomic Notes/202607181002 Retrieval practice improves learning.md
semantic_alignment_cases.definition_source: First sentence under ## Definition or first visible DAE sentence
semantic_alignment_cases.definition_sentence: Retrieval practice strengthens later recall by requiring an answer before feedback.
